query:
-- Check session 20 trades
SELECT COUNT(*) as tradeCount, SUM(realizedPnl) as totalPnl, MAX(ABS(realizedPnl)) as maxSinglePnl
FROM paperTrades 
WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 20;

-- Check recent trades in last 24h (should only be session 20)
SELECT sessionId, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(realizedPnl) as pnl
FROM paperTrades
WHERE userId = 1 AND closedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY sessionId;
